summary: Add the M4 AI conversation panel surface with streaming send, cancellation, fenced-code proposal presentation, explicit Apply edit review, and truthful unconfigured fallback.

decisions.decision: The panel receives a provider-neutral streaming callback, renders assistant text as a transcript, extracts fenced blocks into pending proposals, and only invokes onApplyEdit after an explicit Apply edit action.
decisions.rationale: This keeps network/provider ownership outside the UI, preserves review-before-mutation, and gives AC-10.b a real tested surface without claiming the remaining runtime wiring.

testEvidence.criterion: The panel test fails before the implementation is complete and passes for streaming transcript, reviewable apply, and unconfigured setup behavior.
testEvidence.test: Run the focused AI panel suite once after the bounded implementation and assertion corrections.

red.outcome: RED: both tests failed: the initial exact copy/code assertions did not match rendered output and the panel module also had a useRef type diagnostic.

green.outcome: GREEN: Test Files 1 passed (1); Tests 2 passed (2); Duration 830ms.

testEvidence.criterion: The panel remains type-safe and source-policy clean.
testEvidence.test: Run TypeScript and repository lint/source policy after the bounded corrections.

red.outcome: RED: TS2554 and TS2322 were reported for the uninitialized AbortController ref before the bounded fix.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false; pnpm.cmd lint
green.outcome: GREEN: TypeScript exited 0; Checked 424 files in 222ms with source policy passed.

questions: The panel is callback-driven and is not yet connected to WorkbenchRuntime's persisted secret loading, current-file context toggles, markdown renderer, or editor diff command; those remain the explicit C10 runtime integration gate.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
